── CISCO IOS / IOS-XE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Sintaxe de referência (comandos dentro de configure terminal — NÃO inclua configure/end):

Regra de acesso (ACL extended):
  ["ip access-list extended FM-PERMIT-HTTPS",
   "permit tcp 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 host 10.0.0.50 eq 443",
   "exit"]

Aplicar ACL em interface:
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1",
   "ip access-group FM-PERMIT-HTTPS in",
   "exit"]

VLAN (switch):
  ["vlan 100", "name Cameras", "exit",
   "interface GigabitEthernet0/1", "switchport mode access", "switchport access vlan 100", "exit"]

Rota estática:
  ["ip route 10.10.10.0 255.255.255.0 192.168.1.254"]

NAT (IOS-XE):
  ["ip nat inside source static 192.168.1.10 200.1.2.3"]

Port-channel / LAG:
  ["interface Port-channel1", "description Uplink", "exit",
   "interface GigabitEthernet0/1", "channel-group 1 mode active", "exit"]

Trunk:
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1",
   "switchport mode trunk",
   "switchport trunk allowed vlan <VLAN_A>,<VLAN_B>",
   "exit"]

VLAN (operações adicionais):
  Renomear VLAN:          ["vlan 100", "name NOVO-NOME", "exit"]
  Deletar VLAN:           ["no vlan 100"]
  Múltiplas VLANs:        ["vlan 100", "name GERENCIA", "exit", "vlan 200", "name CFTV", "exit"]

Interface acesso completa (com descrição, storm-control, portfast):
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1",
   "description WORKSTATION-01",
   "switchport mode access",
   "switchport access vlan 100",
   "spanning-tree portfast",
   "spanning-tree bpduguard enable",
   "storm-control broadcast level 20",
   "storm-control multicast level 20",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Interface desativar / reativar:
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1", "shutdown", "exit"]
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1", "no shutdown", "exit"]

Interface Voice VLAN (dados untagged + voz tagged):
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1",
   "description RAMAL-01",
   "switchport mode access",
   "switchport access vlan 10",
   "switchport voice vlan 20",
   "spanning-tree portfast",
   "spanning-tree bpduguard enable",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Interface L3 SVI (VLAN com IP):
  ["interface Vlan100",
   "ip address 192.168.100.1 255.255.255.0",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

DHCP relay (ip helper-address em SVI):
  ["interface Vlan100",
   "ip helper-address 10.0.0.1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Speed e duplex:
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1", "speed 100", "duplex full", "exit"]
  ["interface GigabitEthernet0/1", "speed auto", "duplex auto", "exit"]

STP/RSTP — global (PVST+ por VLAN — modo padrão Cisco):
  Modo RPVST+:                ["spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst"]   ← recomendado
  Modo MSTP:                  ["spanning-tree mode mst"]
  Portfast global (edge):     ["spanning-tree portfast default"]
  BPDU Guard global:          ["spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default"]
  Loop Guard global:          ["spanning-tree loopguard default"]

  Priority por VLAN (múltiplos de 4096; padrão=32768):
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 priority 4096"]    ← forçar root para VLAN 1
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1,10,20 priority 4096"]  ← múltiplas VLANs
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 priority 28672"]   ← root secundário

  Timers por VLAN:
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 hello-time 2"]
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 forward-time 15"]
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 max-age 20"]

STP/RSTP — por porta (dentro do bloco de interface):
  Portfast (edge port — hosts/servidores):
    "spanning-tree portfast"
    "no spanning-tree portfast"

  Proteções:
    "spanning-tree bpduguard enable"          ← bloqueia porta ao receber BPDU
    "no spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
    "spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"         ← suprime BPDUs (usar com cautela)
    "no spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"
    "spanning-tree guard root"                ← root guard (uplinks)
    "no spanning-tree guard root"
    "spanning-tree guard loop"                ← loop guard individual
    "no spanning-tree guard loop"
    "spanning-tree link-type point-to-point"  ← transição rápida em uplinks full-duplex

  Custo e prioridade por VLAN (ajuste de topologia):
    "spanning-tree vlan 1 cost 10000"
    "spanning-tree vlan 1 port-priority 128"  ← múltiplos de 32; padrão=128

STP/RSTP — MSTP (quando mode mst):
  Configuração da região:
    ["spanning-tree mst configuration",
     "name NOME_REGIAO",
     "revision 1",
     "instance 1 vlan 10,20,30",
     "instance 2 vlan 40,50",
     "exit"]

  Priority por instância MST:
    ["spanning-tree mst 1 priority 4096"]
    ["spanning-tree mst 0 priority 32768"]    ← instância 0 = IST

  Por porta MST:
    "spanning-tree mst 1 cost 20000"
    "spanning-tree mst 1 port-priority 128"

STP — show commands (diagnóstico):
  "show spanning-tree"                                 ← resumo todas as VLANs
  "show spanning-tree summary"                         ← contagem e modo
  "show spanning-tree detail"                          ← timers, root, TCNs
  "show spanning-tree vlan 1"                          ← VLAN específica
  "show spanning-tree interface GigabitEthernet0/1"    ← estado por porta
  "show spanning-tree interface GigabitEthernet0/1 detail"
  "show spanning-tree mst"                             ← MSTP
  "show spanning-tree mst configuration"               ← região MST

── LIST_VLANS (cisco_ios): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan brief"]

── LIST_PORTS (cisco_ios):
  Geral:          ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces status"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces GigabitEthernet0/1", "show running-config interface GigabitEthernet0/1"]
  Combinado:      ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan brief", "show interfaces status"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (cisco_ios):
  ssh_show_commands: ["show running-config"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces status", "show ip route"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip interface brief"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show mac address-table"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show spanning-tree"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show cdp neighbors"]

── SISTEMA (cisco_ios):
  Hostname:       ["hostname SW-NOME"]
  Banner MOTD:    ["banner motd # Acesso Restrito. Monitorado e sujeito a sanções. #"]
  Syslog:         ["logging host 10.0.0.1", "logging trap informational"]
  Remover syslog: ["no logging host 10.0.0.1"]
  Desabilitar Telnet (forçar SSH): ["line vty 0 15", "transport input ssh", "exit"]

── NTP (cisco_ios):
  ["ntp server 10.0.0.1 prefer",
   "ntp server 10.0.0.2",
   "clock timezone BRT -3"]
  Remover NTP:  ["no ntp server 10.0.0.1"]

── SNMP (cisco_ios):
  Community RO:   ["snmp-server community PUBLIC ro"]
  Community RO com ACL (restrição de IP recomendada):
    ["ip access-list standard SNMP-ACL", "permit 10.0.0.70", "exit",
     "snmp-server community PUBLIC ro SNMP-ACL"]
  Localização e contato:
    ["snmp-server location DATACENTER-NOME",
     "snmp-server contact admin@empresa.com"]
  Trap host v2c:  ["snmp-server host 10.0.0.70 version 2c PUBLIC"]
  Desabilitar traps desnecessários:
    ["no snmp-server enable traps spanning-tree",
     "no snmp-server enable traps port-security",
     "no snmp-server enable traps envmon"]

── GET_INFO DIAGNÓSTICO (cisco_ios) — usuário descreve um PROBLEMA ──────────────

CPU alta / processos travados:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show processes cpu sorted", "show processes cpu history",
    "show memory statistics", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show interfaces status", "show version"
  ]

Spanning-tree / instabilidade / TCN:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show spanning-tree detail",
    "show mac address-table count", "show interfaces status",
    "show cdp neighbors", "show version"
  ]

Interfaces com erros / link flapping:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interfaces status", "show interfaces counters errors",
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show cdp neighbors",
    "show mac address-table count", "show version"
  ]

Lentidão de rede / tráfego lento:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interfaces status", "show processes cpu sorted",
    "show memory statistics", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show ip route summary", "show version"
  ]

Erros / logs do sistema:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show logging", "show processes cpu sorted",
    "show memory statistics", "show interfaces status", "show version"
  ]

Diagnóstico geral / verificação completa:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show version", "show processes cpu sorted", "show memory statistics",
    "show interfaces status", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show cdp neighbors",
    "show ip route summary", "show vlan brief"
  ]
